name: DICK'S Sporting Goods, Inc.
description: DICK'S Sporting Goods, Inc. is an omni-channel sporting goods retailer offering an extensive assortment of authentic, high-quality sports equipment, apparel, footwear, and accessories. Founded in 1948 and headquartered in Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania, the company operates over 850 stores across the United States, including specialty concepts like Golf Galaxy, Public Lands, and House of Sport. DICK'S serves athletes and outdoor enthusiasts through its dedicated retail locations and robust e-commerce platform.
